nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake
nodes.description: name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake | short_description: A one-pan sheet-pan dinner featuring smoky-tossed pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced, conven
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake - name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Smoky Bake | short_description: A one-pan sheet-pan dinner featuring smoky-tossed pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced, convenient meal. | meal_suggestion: Serving idea: 4 oz pork tenderloin, 1 cup potatoes, and 1 cup green beans, roasted with olive oil and smoky spices. Lightly season for flavor and pair with a simple leafy-green salad for extra volume and nutrients. | nutrition_note: Lean protein from pork tenderloin; fiber from potatoes and green beans; healthy fats from olive oil. Provides a balanced mix of protein, complex carbohydrates, and micronutrients; can reduce calories by using a smaller amount of oil and trimming visible fat.

nodes.name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Variation
nodes.description: name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Protein-forward roast dinner featuring chicken, quinoa, and vegetables, with an optional berry-backed antioxidant boost. | meal_
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Variation - name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Protein-forward roast dinner featuring chicken, quinoa, and vegetables, with an optional berry-backed antioxidant boost. | meal_suggestion: Roast chicken thighs with quinoa, steamed broccoli, and carrots. For Berry Boost, add a side of mixed berries or a small berry glaze to introduce antioxidants and a touch of sweetness without overpowering the savory components. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich roast chicken thighs paired with fiber from quinoa and vegetables. Broccoli and carrots provide vitamins C and A, plus minerals. Berry Boost variation can include a berry side or light glaze to add antioxidants; use unsweetened berries to minimize added sugars.

nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Bake
nodes.description: name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Bake | short_description: A quick sheet-pan dinner featuring pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced meal. | meal_sug
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Bake - name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Berry Boost Bake | short_description: A quick sheet-pan dinner featuring pork tenderloin, potatoes, and green beans roasted with olive oil for a balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Roast pork tenderloin with potatoes and green beans on a sheet pan using olive oil; season lightly and pair with a cup of fresh berries or a berry yogurt for additional flavor and antioxidants. | nutrition_note: Lean pork tenderloin provides high-quality protein; potatoes contribute energy-rich carbohydrates; green beans add fiber and micronutrients; olive oil supplies heart-healthy fats. For a balanced serving, aim for about 3–4 oz pork, 1 cup potatoes, and 1 cup green beans, with olive oil portion kept moderate. Add berries on the side to boost vitamins and antioxidants if desired.
